Notice Of Motion For Order Compelling Further Responses To Discovery And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-14-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. BARON L. MILLER, Esq. (Tel: 415-522-0300) for plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF LYS C. MILLER-VALARIS's Motion For Order Compelling Further Responses To Discovery And For Sanctions.

Plaintiff stipulates to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge. The pro tem judge and counsel for plaintiff (both appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

No opposition filed; motion granted. Supplemental responses to be served by November 30, 2022. Each defendant shall pay sanctions of $500 each.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order to the pro tem judge at davididaho14@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-19-2022 Set For Trial On May-08-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
